subcodes.first_line: O Prince! The Wronged One remembereth thee at the hour when sorrows have encompassed Him through that which the hands of them that have denied have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا میر یذکرک المظلوم فی حین احاطته الاحزان بما اکتسبت ایدی الذین انکروا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
